news.headline: Transgender student sues Hong Kong school over ‘discriminatory’ hair policy

news.headline: China ‘Madman of Science’ believes budget space travel is viable after low-cost rocket launch
news.summary:
An innovator in China has successfully launched a self-developed low-cost rocket, proving the feasibility of budget space exploration to the world.
